9849907128.title: Fix Contact Form Spam Protection
9849907128.whyItMatters: Spam submissions hurt website credibility and can negatively impact search rankings.

9848722523.title: Fix Pagination Navigation Links
9848722523.whyItMatters: Broken pagination prevents search engines from properly crawling and indexing all your pages.

9848722520.title: Reduce Sitemap File Size
9848722520.whyItMatters: Oversized sitemaps can't be processed by search engines, preventing proper page indexing.

9848722515.title: Split Large Sitemap Into Smaller Files
9848722515.whyItMatters: Sitemaps with too many URLs get rejected by search engines, hurting page visibility.

9848722510.title: Fix Pages Blocked From Search Results
9848722510.whyItMatters: Pages marked 'noindex' won't appear in search results, reducing your website's visibility.

9848722507.title: Fix Links Blocked From Search Crawling
9848722507.whyItMatters: Nofollow links prevent search engines from discovering and ranking connected pages.

9848722505.title: Make Pagination Pages Searchable
9848722505.whyItMatters: Hidden pagination pages prevent search engines from finding and indexing your content.

9848722499.title: Compress Large Images For Faster Loading
9848722499.whyItMatters: Heavy images slow down your website, which hurts search rankings and user experience.

9848722495.title: Fix Duplicate Page URL Issues
9848722495.whyItMatters: Canonical issues confuse search engines about which page version to rank in results.

9848722489.title: Add Missing Page Headlines
9848722489.whyItMatters: Pages without H1 headlines are harder for search engines to understand and rank properly.
